ksa_text: Knowledge of regulatory enforcement mechanisms, including supervisory authority powers, penalty structures, precedent enforcement actions, and the distinction between binding requirements, regulatory guidance, and industry codes of conduct.

dcwf.top_element_label: Interpret and apply applicable laws, statutes, and regulatory documents and integrate into policy.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of code tailoring tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of code tailoring tools and techniques
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Interpret and apply applicable laws, statutes, and regulatory documents and integrate into policy.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Regulatory Compliance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.427) to justify inclusion for the AI CoE Leader. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.427 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Edge-domain Knowledge KSAs require more than moderate signal to justify inclusion; the role's scope does not regularly engage with Regulatory Compliance. Exclusion upheld.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Upheld: edge-domain exclusion maintained. Regulatory Compliance is not sufficiently central to the AI CoE Leader to warrant inclusion at this signal level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world AI CoE Leader roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for AI CoE Leader roles increasingly include Regulatory Compliance competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for AI CoE Leader now include Regulatory Compliance competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Regulatory Compliance knowledge KSA is relevant to the AI CoE Leader based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
